title: Flash - Bathroom Cleaning Spray - 450ml
description: Product Description Flash Liquid Bathroom Cleaner is Specifically design for bathroom cleaning, this surface cleaner fights soap scum, dirt from your surfaces, leaving them shiny clean. On top, its shine protect formula prevents watermarks and soapy water build-up, so you can keep your surfaces shiny longer. You can safely use this bath cleaner everyday on your bathroom surfaces: Bathtubs, linoleum, showers, sinks, toilets, tiles and taps. Ingredients Anionic Surfactants, Non-Ionic Surfactants, Benzisothiazolinone, Perfumes, Hexyl Cinnamal Safety Warning Causes serious eye irritation. Keep out of reach of children. If medical advice is required, have packaging or label at hand. For eyes: rinse gently with water for a few minutes. Remove any contact lenses. Continue to rinse. Do not inhale. May cause an allergic reaction. Legal Disclaimer Warnings Causes serious eye irritation. Keep out of reach of children. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. Do not breathe spray. May produce an allergic reaction. See more
